name: Priya Shah
summary: Strong React experience, communicates clearly. Showed solid CSS fundamentals and asked thoughtful questions about accessibility.

name: Marcus Chen
summary: Some SQL gaps, but solid problem-solving. Strong statistics background and Python experience.

name: Aisha Bello
summary: Excellent stakeholder examples; strong on prioritization. Has shipped two products from 0 to 1.

name: Tom Reilly
summary: Limited recent experience; may need ramp-up. Eager and willing to learn but rusty on modern tooling.

name: Lena Voss
summary: Good systems thinking; light on testing background. Strong Go and PostgreSQL skills.

name: Diego Martinez
summary: Great distributed-systems intuition. Clear, concise communicator.

name: Hana Suzuki
summary: Solid Vue background, transitioning to React. Strong design sense.

name: Olu Adebayo
summary: Outstanding portfolio of dashboards; strong stakeholder management.

name: Sara Johansson
summary: Some PM experience but mostly in adjacent roles. Strong analytical thinking.

name: Karim El-Sayed
summary: Exceptional candidate; deep experience scaling Postgres and Kafka. Mentioned several open-source contributions.

name: Yuki Tanaka
summary: Strong TypeScript skills, knows React Server Components well.

name: Fatima Hassan
summary: Strong API design experience and security awareness. Asked smart questions about our auth setup.

name: Eli Rosenberg
summary: Decent React, weaker on CSS. Strong on testing and CI.
